creator: farhan@farhan.codes
text:
I was able to connect to my AP.

I tested this from my dev VM, I'm on 14.0-CURRENT the latest commit (2 days ago as of writing this)

My wifi card:
rtwn0: <Realtek 802.11n WLAN NIC, class 0/0, rev 2.00/0.00, addr 2> on usbus3
rtwn0: MAC/BB RTL8188EU, RF 6052 1T1R

Sorry to not be more helpful, but it works for me :/
